name: Piece of Stass Design Tokens
description: Production design tokens for pieceofstass.com. v2 'Atelier' refresh (June 2026): the palette moves off the high-contrast Stass Lime on near-black canvas to a warm, premium, feminine-leaning system — Bone Cream canvas, Espresso text, with a single ownable signature accent, Stass Rose (a dusty mauve-rose). Secondary accent is warm Sage; a small terracotta Clay 'moment' color is reserved for sale tags, urgency and conversion. Mobile-first, WCAG AA. The legacy lime/ink system is preserved under `color.legacy` in case we ever want it back as a sub-brand accent. NOTE ON TAILWIND KEYS: the Tailwind color keys (lime, ink, paper, charcoal, slate, etc.) are intentionally retained from v1 and REMAPPED to new hex values so existing var(--color-*) references flip to the warm system automatically. New semantic names (cream, espresso, rose, sage, clay, accent) are provided as the canonical aliases.

meta.fontStrategy: Google Fonts only, self-hosted woff2, font-display: swap

refresh.rationale: Client feedback: the lime-on-black palette read too jarring/loud for the core audience (Gen-Z to millennial women, 18-35, discovering via Instagram & TikTok). v2 keeps the brand DNA — confident, curated, slightly cheeky, 'Raid the stash.' — but warms the system to feel premium and feminine-without-being-twee. Reference moodboard: the warm minimalism of Glossier, the soft luxury of Reformation, the modern-feminine of SKIMS, with one signature rose pop that owns the brand. Colors are tuned to screenshot beautifully on mobile / TikTok.

cream.description: Bone Cream — primary warm light canvas. NOT pure white. Backgrounds, large fields. Espresso text on cream = 13.92:1.

espresso.description: Espresso — warm near-black. NOT pure black. Primary text on cream, dark UI accents, footer. Contrast vs cream = 13.92:1.

rose.description: Stass Rose — the signature, ownable hue (dusty mauve-rose). Primary CTA fill, wordmark accent, links, save/stash icon, 'new' flags. Text on a Rose fill must ALWAYS be Cream (5.03:1), never Espresso. Rose as text/link on cream = 5.03:1 (AA body pass).

roseBright.description: Stass Rose (bright) — large-text and decorative-only variant of the signature for hero display type, gradient partner and oversized graphic moments. Large text/3:1 use only on cream (3.94:1).

sage.description: Warm Sage — secondary accent, grounding/natural counterpoint to Rose. Pills, secondary CTAs, category chips, links on dark. Cream text on Sage = 5.08:1. Sage as large text on cream = 3.97:1.

clay.description: Terracotta Clay — the small 'moment' color. Used SPARINGLY for sale tags, urgency, countdowns and conversion CTAs. Use the deep variant (#9B4824) as a fill behind Cream text (5.54:1). Clay as large text/icon on cream = 3.46:1. Never a primary surface.

clayDeep.description: Clay (deep) — sale-tag / urgency fill. Cream text on Clay-deep = 5.54:1 (AA). Clay-deep as body text on cream = 5.54:1.

surfaceRaised.description: Raised cards / panels / inputs on cream. Slightly lighter than canvas to lift content. Espresso text = 14.76:1.

line.description: Warm hairline borders, dividers, rules on light.

muted.description: Warm Taupe — secondary text on cream. Contrast vs cream = 4.99:1 (AA body pass).

faint.description: Tertiary text, placeholders, disabled, decorative labels. Vs cream = 3.15:1 (large/non-essential only).

surfaceSunken.description: Sunken/inset surfaces, alt rows, skeleton base. Espresso text = 12.87:1.

success.description: Forest — order confirmed, in stock. Vs cream = 5.53:1. Cream on success = 5.53:1.

error.description: Brick — form errors, sold out. Vs cream = 5.23:1. Cream on error = 5.23:1.

warning.description: Amber (text) — low stock, caution as text on cream = 4.12:1 (use at 14px+ bold / large).

warningFill.description: Amber fill for low-stock badges; Espresso text on it = 8.31:1.

blush.description: Atelier Blush — the one sanctioned gradient (Rose -> Clay), warm and editorial. Hero washes, drop reveals, app splash. Backgrounds only, never on the wordmark or body text. For text gradients use over cream at display sizes only.

creamWash.description: Quiet cream-to-sand vertical wash for soft section backgrounds and the hero base. The feminine, premium default.

legacy.description: v1 'Stass Lime' system — retired as the primary palette June 2026 but preserved here in case we ever want the lime/ink energy back as a sub-brand, drop-specific accent, or limited-edition capsule. Do NOT use in the default UI.

ink.description: Legacy Stass Ink — former near-black canvas.

paper.description: Legacy Stash Paper — former light surface.

ramp.description: Full 50-950 Tailwind shade ramps for the four primary brand colors plus espresso. 500 is the canonical brand value. Tints mix toward white; shades mix toward a warm black (#1A1410).

display.description: Wordmark, hero headlines, product titles, price flexes. Min 18px.

body.description: Body, nav, buttons, captions. 16px mobile floor.

accent.description: Receipts, prices/compare-at, drop numbers, timestamp labels. Tiny doses.

scale.description: 12-step type scale. Mobile-first px values. Pair size with the role; same role = same size everywhere.

2xs.use: legal microcopy (above 12px floor only for non-essential labels; avoid for body)

xs.use: captions, tags, helper text — absolute floor

spacing.description: 8pt grid. 4px half-step allowed for fine adjustments. All layout spacing uses these tokens.

radii.description: Default product cards use lg (16px). Buttons use pill. Inputs use md. v2 leans into the soft, generous radii for a calmer, more premium feel.

shadow.description: Soft, warm, low-spread shadows tinted with Espresso. On a light cream canvas, elevation is subtle — avoid heavy or cool-gray drop shadows.

rose-glow.description: Signature focus/active glow for primary CTA and stash actions (Rose). Use sparingly — softer than the old lime glow.

duration.description: Micro 120-180ms, standard 200-280ms, hero 400-600ms. Nothing user-blocking over 600ms. v2: motion is a touch gentler — favor expo-out settles over springy overshoot for a calmer, premium read.

expo-out.description: Default entrance — quick in, gentle settle. Primary v2 easing.

spring.description: Interactive overshoot — add-to-bag, stash save. Use a smaller pop (1.08) in v2.

transform.description: Hover up, press down (web, 150ms). Softer pop (1.08) for save/stash confirmation in v2.

reducedMotion.description: Honor prefers-reduced-motion — replace springs/parallax with simple opacity fades.

breakpoints.description: Mobile-first. 90%+ of traffic is social/mobile — design at sm, enhance up.

tailwind.description: Mapping for Tailwind v4 @theme / theme.extend. The v1 keys (lime, ink, paper, charcoal, slate, violet, pink, surface) are RETAINED and remapped to v2 warm values so existing var(--color-*) references flip automatically. Canonical v2 aliases (cream, espresso, rose, sage, clay, accent) are also exposed.
